# Image

**Status:** Stable  
**Category:** text  
**Import:** `drawui`  
**Emitted class(es):** `Image`

Image wrapper around `img`.

_Source: `src/primitives/ui.js`_

## Import

```js
import { Image } from "drawui";
```

## Examples

### Image

```js
return new Image(
    "data:image/svg+xml," +
      encodeURIComponent(
        '<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="64" height="64"><rect width="64" height="64" rx="8" fill="#70ba35"/></svg>',
      ),
  ).setStyle("width", ["4rem"]);
```
